name: display sentinel: debug leak ('coherence flag') hard-fires with block_and_repair recommendation

source.purpose: PRD Fix 6 worked example. Narrator visibly reasons about its own diagnostic state — 'The coherence flag is right' — which would let the model leak system-level vocabulary into player-facing prose. Sentinel must catch it as severity=hard with recommendedAction=block_and_repair.

narrator.prose: The coherence flag is right — the girl needs an entrance before she speaks. She steps in from behind the equipment skid.
